name: GitHub for Startups
summary: Developer platform package with free Enterprise seats and security tool discounts.
benefits: Up to 20 seats of GitHub Enterprise free for one year
Up to 20 seats of GitHub Advanced Security 50% off for one year
Access to exclusive startup network events and resources
Unlimited free public and private repositories
eligibility: Received outside equity funding (Series B or earlier)
New to GitHub Enterprise or Advanced Security
Must use a subscription-based model (no pay-as-you-go)
